root_cause: Intercompany clearing journal didn't sweep on schedule.
description: Variance of $647.97 on 110000 attributed to one or more invoices that posted to the subledger after the BD3 cutover but were not picked up in the GL feed.
lessons_learned: Update BD3 cutover checklist to include this feed; flag in next-period control test.
resolution_summary: Corrective JE posted; variance cleared in subsequent recon refresh.
proposed_resolution: Reverse the duplicate entry; re-post once the original is confirmed cleared.

root_cause: FX rate table refresh ran 4 hours late on BD2.
description: Supporting detail for 105000 Short-term Investments exceeds GL balance by $563.14 in acme_cloud_FP-2025-09. Acme's money-market fund pays interest in arrears and the BD3 sweep did not capture the September month-end interest accrual; the custodian statement reflects accrued interest not yet booked to the GL. Review the money-market custodian statement; the accrual clears via the next-period adjusting entry.
lessons_learned: Update BD3 cutover checklist to include this feed; flag in next-period control test.
resolution_summary: Corrective JE posted; variance cleared in subsequent recon refresh.
proposed_resolution: Reverse the duplicate entry; re-post once the original is confirmed cleared.
